commands.review_summary:
The PR threads filename overrides through Feishu outbound sends, adds Feishu sendPayload/local upload handling and tests, and bundles unrelated workflow, CODEOWNERS, docs, scripts, skills, OpenAI WebSocket, and lockfile changes.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible. Current main exposes a filename parameter, but action send is not hydrated as an attachment action, the outbound context has no filename field, and the Feishu action send path does not pass fileName to sendMediaFeishu; I did not run a live Feishu send.
commands.review_followup: Human/contributor rework is needed because the external PR lacks real behavior proof and mixes a valid Feishu bug fix with security-sensitive unrelated changes.
